name: Password Dumper Activity on LSASS
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: sigma
SIGMA Title: Password Dumper Activity on LSASS
SIGMA Description: Detects process handle on LSASS process with certain access mask and object type SAM_DOMAIN

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4656 AND LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\lsass.exe' AND "Access Mask"='0x705' AND "Object Type"='SAM_DOMAIN' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Password Dumper Activity on LSASS on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4656 AND LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\lsass.exe' AND "Access Mask"='0x705' AND "Object Type"='SAM_DOMAIN' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Password Dumper Activity on LSASS
